title: RadioGroup
description: Radio group with single selection, semantic fieldset/legend and full label, helper and error support.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Option list with single selection bound via v-model.
basic.label: Plan

described.title: With description
described.desc: Each option can include secondary text to add context.
described.label: Choose your plan

horizontal.title: Horizontal
horizontal.desc: Ideal for short options aligned in a single row.
horizontal.label: Favourite color

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes available for different UI densities.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: Locks the entire group while keeping the selection visible.
disabled.label: Disabled

props.options: Options \{ value, label, description?, disabled? \} to render.
props.name: Name attribute shared by all radios. Auto-generated if omitted.
props.label: Group label (rendered as <legend>).
props.orientation: Layout direction of the radios within the group.
props.color: Semantic color applied to all radios.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the selected option changes (syncs v-model).

slots.default: Allows rendering Radios manually when per-option customisation is needed.
